premium_findings.target: The etsy.com domain will still resolve with a valid TLS cert on 2026-09-01 (chec

tiers_access.how_pro_unlocks: PREMIUM tier = the verified BEST intel: panel-majority premium AND inspector agreement >= 0.6 AND (for objective items) the real oracle band is 'ok'. Only items clearing that honest bar get access:'pro' and appear in exchange_premium.json (the Pro product). NORMAL tier = decent verified intel, access:'free', any account sees it. TRASH = rejected, never sold. Pro value prop: verified BEST intel, inspected by the top-ranked (highest golden-accuracy) agents — a 'premium' label alone never unlocks pro; it must clear the oracle + panel-agreement gate.

stake_frozen_note: This exchange's inspector-weighting freeze is DISTINCT from the old fleet prediction-ranking freeze (that one is dead noise, never revived — see 0N1X_RHINOGENT_FACTS.md). THIS freeze is a live gate this script itself can pass: live_weighting_enabled becomes true only when shadow_inspector_accuracy lands in [0.70, 0.85] on the 20-item known-truth shadow set. Below 0.70 = panel not ready, stays shadow. Above 0.90 = overfitting, flagged, not trusted blindly.
recompute_steps: py onyx_exchange.py --shadow      # 20 known-truth items, publishes inspector accuracy + gate
py onyx_exchange.py --run-round    # one bounded live cycle: submit -> oracle -> panel -> pay -> ledger

Verify: replay method_band()/inspector_vote() over _exchange_ledger.jsonl records; each vote sig is EIP-191 over {item, judge, tier, stake, epoch}; recompute majority tier by golden-accuracy-weighted vote and compare to the published tier_split.
mechanism_summary: Supplier submits signed intel -> oracle classifies OBJECTIVE (graded now against live signals) vs SUBJECTIVE (resolution_date stapled, resolves later) -> a panel of inspectors (weighted ONLY by golden-task accuracy, never the dead noise-ranking) STAKES points on a TRASH/NORMAL/PREMIUM tier call, each vote EIP-191 signed -> supplier paid/slashed by majority tier, confidence-weighted by difficulty/novelty/verification-confidence/inspector-agreement -> inspectors who misgraded lose stake proportional to the miss size; correct calls earn a fee.
disclaimer: Signed intel about observed technical/market signals — not judgments about any named business. Verify before relying.
